ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., Poly nuclear aromatic Hydrocarbons) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic (e.g., mg/L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of characteristic (physical, chemical, biological) */,
  "reference_standard" TEXT /* Reference standard for the characteristic */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement */,
  "critical_level" TEXT /* Levels that trigger alerts or actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissible_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limit */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic the limit applies to */,
  "limit_value" REAL /* Value of the permissible limit */,
  "limit_type" TEXT /* Type of limit (e.g., Max, Min) */,
  "relaxation_rule" TEXT /* Relaxation rule in the absence of alternative source */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the limit becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the limit expires */,
  "regulatory_authority" TEXT /* Authority that set the limit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissible_limits_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the laboratory */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "accreditation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the laboratory is accredited */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number if accredited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the monitoring station */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the station */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., river, lake, groundwater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic the data applies to */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory that provided the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station that provided the data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the water quality data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for measurement */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Precision of the measurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., validated, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("char_id")
)
column_names: Name of the characteristic (e.g., Poly nuclear aromatic Hydrocarbons)

Levels that trigger alerts or actions
